title: SmartSpawner
description: A GUI-based spawner plugin that generates items and experience without spawning mobs
body:
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/smartspawner) [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.com/invite/FJN7hJKPyb) [![ghpages](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/ghpages_64h.png)](https://docs.smartspawner.site/) --- ### Why SmartSpawner? Say goodbye to entity lag forever. SmartSpawner calculates mob drops and XP virtually - **no actual mobs spawn**, no AI processing, zero pathfinding eating your tick. This plugin is inspired by the iconic spawner mechanic from **[DonutSMP](https://www.youtube.com/@DonutSMPServer)** now available on your own server. **Perfect for:** Survival servers • Skyblock • Prison • Factions • Any server where spawners matter
--- ## Main Feature Showcase
![gui-showcase](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OpenVdra/SmartSpawner/refs/heads/main/docs/public/gui-showcase.gif) ### [Advanced Spawner GUI](https://docs.smartspawner.site) Intuitive GUI system that makes spawner management simple, with quick controls, clear metrics, and easy handling of drops and experience
### [Spawner Stacking](https://docs.smartspawner.site/) Optimize performance with smooth spawner stacking. Players can easily stack spawners via right-click or manage them precisely through a dedicated GUI. ![spawner-stacking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OpenVdra/SmartSpawner/refs/heads/main/docs/public/spawner-stacking.gif)
![Bedorck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/296b004fe3cf345da0e8f89c288f4cd5c2522744.png) ### [Bedrock FormUI Support](https://docs.smartspawner.site/plugin-compatibility/) Native **Floodgate** integration. Bedrock players get beautiful, mobile-friendly form menus instead of chest GUIs. No extra configuration needed!
### [Admin Spawner Management](https://docs.smartspawner.site/) Your all-in-one admin panel for managing every spawner on the server. Instantly teleport to any spawner, inspect detailed data, and make real-time adjustments such as editing stack sizes or removing spawners with ease. ![spawner-list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OpenVdra/SmartSpawner/refs/heads/main/docs/public/spawner-list.gif)
--- ## Highlighted Features
| Feature | Description | |:-------:|:------------| | **[Spawner Holograms](https://docs.smartspawner.site)** | Floating text displays above every spawner showing mob type, stack count, and real-time status - always visible at a glance. | | **[Hopper Integration](https://docs.smartspawner.site/features/)** | Hoppers automatically drain items from spawner virtual storage into adjacent containers, enabling fully automated farming pipelines. | | **[Mineable Spawners](https://docs.smartspawner.site)** | Fully configurable breaking mechanics - require **Silk Touch** to drop spawners, set custom drop chances, and tailor the behavior to perfectly fit your server's rules. | | **[Database Support](https://docs.smartspawner.site)** | Supports both **MySQL/MariaDB** and **SQLite** for spawner data storage. MySQL mode enables cross-server data sync, making it ideal for networks and multi-instance setups. | | **[Fully Configurable](https://docs.smartspawner.site/configuration/)** | Every message, GUI layout, and mob loot table is customizable. All mob types with individually tunable drop tables, prices, and more. | | **[Plugin Compatibility](https://docs.smartspawner.site/plugin-compatibility/)** | Auto-detects and integrates with **20+ popular plugins** - economy (Vault, CoinsEngine), shops (EconomyShopGUI, ShopGUI+,...), protection (WorldGuard, Towny, Lands,..), SkyBlock (SuperiorSkyblock2, BentoBox), and more. [View full list →](https://docs.smartspawner.site/plugin-compatibility/) |
--- ## Localization Want to contribute or update a translation? [Open a Pull Request →](https://github.com/NighterDevelopment/SmartSpawner) | Language | Status | |:--------:|:------:| | 🇺🇸 English | ✅ Latest | | 🇩🇪 German | v1.6.7 | | 🇻🇳 Vietnamese | ✅ Latest | | 🇨🇳 Chinese (Simplified) | v1.2.3 | | 🇮🇹 Italian | v1.3.5 | | 🇹🇷 Turkish | ✅ Latest | --- ## Statistics Over 3,000+ Minecraft servers trust and using SmartSpawner for their spawner management needs. The plugin has proven to be reliable and efficient, making it a popular free choice among server administrators
---
### [Documentation](https://docs.smartspawner.site/) • [Developer API](https://docs.smartspawner.site/developer-api/api-installation/) • [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/FJN7hJKPyb) • [Issues](https://github.com/OpenVdra/smartspawner/issues)
